etymology.description: Semantic ็ณธ (็ณธ, "rope") + phonetic ใกญ (jรฌ)
etymology.interpretation: The character ใกญ serves as an ancient form of ็นผ(็นผ) (jรฌ, "continue"), acting as its phonetic component in the phono-semantic compound. The semantic component ็ณธ(็ณธ) (mรฌ, "rope") implies continuity or connection, which supports the meaning of "continue."
